Package eu.algites.lib.common.version

Class AIcCustomVersionStructure

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.version.AIcCustomVersionStructure
All Implemented Interfaces:
eu.algites.lib.common.enums.AIiEnumItem, AIiVersionStructure, Serializable
public final class AIcCustomVersionStructure extends Object implements AIiVersionStructure, Serializable

Title: AIcCustomVersionStructure

Description: Simple reusable implementation of AIiVersionStructure.

    • code

    • versionBeforeBuild

      public boolean versionBeforeBuild()
      Specified by:
      versionBeforeBuild in interface AIiVersionStructure
      Returns:
      true if the precedence-relevant version part is placed before the build-identification part

    • buildDelimiter

      @Nonnull public String buildDelimiter()
      Description copied from interface: AIiVersionStructure
      Build delimiter separating the precedence-relevant version part and the build-identification part.

      An empty delimiter means that the scheme does not use a dedicated build-identification section.

      Specified by:
      buildDelimiter in interface AIiVersionStructure
      Returns:
      build delimiter or empty string

    • buildComparisonPolicy

      @Nonnull public AInVersionBuildComparisonPolicy buildComparisonPolicy()
      Specified by:
      buildComparisonPolicy in interface AIiVersionStructure
      Returns:
      policy defining whether and how the build-identification part participates in comparison
